title: CIFAR-10 Image Classifier
subtitle: CNN · 10 classes · 32×32 RGB
description: Drop or upload any image. The CNN resizes it to 32×32 and predicts which of the 10 CIFAR-10 categories it belongs to: airplane, automobile, bird, cat, deer, dog, frog, horse, ship, truck.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image to classify
fields.hint: JPG / PNG · any size · auto-resized to 32×32
